name: codex-pilot
description: Automatically guide Codex through repository setup, planning, verification, and durable project guidance when a repo needs better agent support.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex through better repo work.
interface.longDescription: CodexPilot helps Codex automatically recognize when a repo needs better guidance, inspect the project, create useful repo docs, add planning templates, define verification commands, and turn repeated failures into durable docs, tests, scripts, or rules.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodexPilot in this repo.
Audit this repo for missing Codex context.
Turn repeated Codex failures into repo rules.
